d1d2
)4z`
requests.exceptions
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
This module contains the set of Requests' exceptions.
	HTTPErrorc
RequestExceptionzTThere was an ambiguous exception that occurred while handling your
    request.
    c
zBInitialize RequestException with `request` and `response` objects.
responseN
request)
popr

	__class__
C/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/pip/_vendor/requests/exceptions.pyr

__classcell__r
InvalidJSONErrorz
A JSON error occurred.N
An HTTP error occurred.Nr
ConnectionErrorz
A Connection error occurred.Nr
ProxyErrorz
A proxy error occurred.Nr
SSLErrorz
An SSL error occurred.Nr
Timeoutz
The request timed out.
    Catching this error will catch both
    :exc:`~requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout` and
    :exc:`~requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout` errors.
    Nr
ConnectTimeoutz
The request timed out while trying to connect to the remote server.
    Requests that produced this error are safe to retry.
    Nr
ReadTimeoutz@The server did not send any data in the allotted amount of time.Nr
URLRequiredz*A valid URL is required to make a request.Nr
TooManyRedirectsz
Too many redirects.Nr
MissingSchemaz/The URL schema (e.g. http or https) is missing.Nr
InvalidSchemaz"See defaults.py for valid schemas.Nr
InvalidURLz%The URL provided was somehow invalid.Nr
InvalidHeaderz.The header value provided was somehow invalid.Nr
InvalidProxyURLz"The proxy URL provided is invalid.Nr
ChunkedEncodingErrorz?The server declared chunked encoding but sent an invalid chunk.Nr
ContentDecodingErrorz"Failed to decode response content.Nr
StreamConsumedErrorz3The content for this response was already consumed.Nr
RetryErrorz
Custom retries logic failedNr
UnrewindableBodyErrorz;Requests encountered an error when trying to rewind a body.Nr
RequestsWarningz
Base warning for Requests.Nr
FileModeWarningzJA file was opened in text mode, but Requests determined its binary length.Nr
RequestsDependencyWarningz@An imported dependency doesn't match the expected version range.Nr
